texts: Unified layouts and styles of most components across the entire site to better facilitate the new site customization feature. Most things should be roughly the same, but some components had to have some visual changes.
Added display customization settings to site customization. You can change things like background or text color, font, and font size.
Added filter selection mode to site customization. You can change the way filters are selected.
Added an encounters tab to the team builds page for easier access to and visibility for encounter builds searching.
Added a missing choice event (there should be two copies of Gallery of the Ring's Schoool of Fauvism).
Added a placeholder encounter for the new Reflectrial.
Added subitems to achievements with only one subitem for consistency with other achievements.
Fixed an issue where submission mode in collections wasn't appearing when creating a new collection, but appeared when editing an existing one.
Fixed the Youtube preview thumbnail not properly filling the entire embed window.
Fixed the Youtube url parser (used to extract the video id when making a build or md plan) not recognizing livestream links.
Added numerous changes to site metadata to hopefully help with Google's indexing.
